pages.title: Say It With Your Body
pages.tagline: Feel the rhythm of silence in this ultra-deep club anthem.

pages.body: This slow-burning international R&B track invites you into a space where words dissolve against the backdrop of shared heartbeats. Imagine massive sub-bass anchors quietly speaking back to lush cinematic strings, while smoky sax fills drift through the air like incense. The vocals start as intimate whispers before swelling into emotive harmonies that bridge diverse cultures without needing translation. It is a journey from quiet anticipation to raw spiritual surrender on the drop, where every rimshot and cello note builds a luxurious atmosphere of non-verbal connection.
pages.styleSentence: A slow-burning ultra-deep international club anthem at 92 BPM featuring massive long-sustain sub-bass anchors, rich cinematic strings led by cello and viola, subtle smoky tenor sax fills, crisp trap-inspired percussion with soft rimshots, lush vocal harmonies, and intimate whispered ad-libs creating a luxurious nightclub atmosphere where the bass quietly speaks back to vocals.

pages.text:
[Intro]
(Female, whisper)
Closer...
No words...
Come here...
(Bass drops)
[Verse 1 — Male]
Different streets...
Different names...
Different skies...
Same heartbeat...
You smile...
I don't know what to say...
But somehow...
You already know...
[Pre-Chorus — Female]
Your language...
Mine too...
Still...
We're moving...
Like we always knew...
[Chorus]
(Both)
Say it with your body...
Closer...
Say it with your body...
Slower...
Say it with your body...
Move me...
Say it with your body...
Hold me...
Say it with your body, baby...
Don't say maybe...
Just...
Say it with your body...
[Verse 2 — Female]
Every city's got another rhythm...
Every heartbeat finds another home...
You reach for me...
I answer back...
No translation on this road...
[Male]
One small step...
One slow sway...
That's enough...
To tell me everything...
[Pre-Chorus]
(Together)
No dictionary...
No explanation...
Just the music...
And the vibration...
[Drop]
(Instrumental)
Deep sub...
Cello...
Tiny sax response...
Bass wobble...
Strings...
Breathing...
[Chorus 2]
Say it with your body...
Closer...
Say it with your body...
Tighter...
Say it with your body...
Move me...
Say it with your body...
Touch me...
Say it with your body, baby...
Just say it with your body...
[Bridge]
(Female)
When the words don't reach...
(Male)
I'll meet you halfway...
(Female)
When the silence speaks...
(Male)
I'll feel what you say...
(Together)
From Brooklyn...
To Manila...
To Lagos...
To Saigon...
Every heartbeat...
Speaks the same...
[Final Chorus]
Say it with your body...
Slowly...
Say it with your body...
Hold me...
Say it with your body...
Show me...
Say it with your body...
Know me...
Say it with your body, baby...
Make me feel...
Every little heartbeat...
Say it with your body...
Just...
Say it with your body...
[Outro]
(Female whisper over fading cello and sub-bass)
You never had to say a word...
I heard you...

pages.vocalStyle: Intimate whispers transitioning into smooth, emotive singing with layered harmonies

members.bio: WOODWINDS offer tiny sax responses that dance around the main vocal performance.

levels.name: SHARED SOUL
levels.emotion: Quiet realization of shared soul across distances
